name: Anthropic Web Reference
description: A warm editorial research-and-product system inspired by Anthropic public pages and Claude Design guidance, with parchment surfaces, ink typography, structured cards, and collaborative canvas patterns.

en.name: Anthropic Web Reference
en.description: A warm editorial research-and-product system inspired by Anthropic public pages and Claude Design guidance, with parchment surfaces, ink typography, structured cards, and collaborative canvas patterns.

zh-CN.name: Anthropic 网页参考
zh-CN.description: 受 Anthropic 公开页面和 Claude Design 指南启发的温暖编辑式研究与产品系统，包含羊皮纸色表面、墨色排版、结构化卡片和协作画布模式。
